## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see and how it would work.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples that would help explain the feature.
